title: Setup Local SDK
description: Installs a project-local .NET SDK without changing the machine-wide installation. Use it for isolated repo setup, preview validation, and repeatable SDK pinning.

title: ASP.NET Core Web API
description: Guides agents through building or updating Web API endpoints with solid HTTP semantics, OpenAPI metadata, and error handling. A strong fit for controller and minimal API work.

title: Optimizing EF Core Queries
description: Helps diagnose slow EF Core queries by surfacing N+1 issues, tracking behavior, and query-shape problems. Useful when LINQ looks fine but the generated SQL is doing too much work.

title: Analyzing .NET Performance
description: Scans C# for common performance anti-patterns across async flows, memory usage, strings, collections, LINQ, and I/O. Useful for hot-path reviews and targeted cleanup passes.

title: Binlog Failure Analysis
description: Analyzes MSBuild binary logs to explain build failures that are hard to decode from console output alone. Especially helpful for multi-project builds, target-order issues, and cascading errors.

title: Convert to CPM
description: Migrates repositories to Directory.Packages.props and helps unify drifting NuGet versions. Useful when package governance is spread across many project files.

title: Nullable Reference Migration
description: Enables nullable reference types in an existing project and works through warnings systematically. Useful for modernizing APIs and improving compiler guidance without blending in behavior changes.

title: Run .NET Tests
description: Detects the active .NET test platform and chooses the right dotnet test command, filters, and reporting switches. Useful when test runners, SDK behavior, or filter syntax keep getting in the way.

title: C# Feature Upgrade Audit
description: Scans existing code for older idioms and maps them to newer C# features with guidance tied back to this site's docs. It is designed to turn feature discovery into an upgrade plan.

title: Snippet Guided Refactor
description: Suggests the smallest modern C# snippet or pattern for a coding task, then explains why it fits. It is meant to turn the snippet library into an agent-friendly workflow.

title: Analyzer Fix Coach
description: Interprets analyzer hits and turns them into safe, batchable refactoring steps with links back to the matching feature guide. It is aimed at moving teams from squiggle to rollout plan faster.
